title: Climbing
body:
This is a mod that adds the ability to ledge grab by pressing a key (R by default).

You must be looking at the wall and it must have a non-solid block above it.



![Climbing gif](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/888272276783517716/1406365342388850740/java_7RDZGO6Zft.gif?ex=68a2334a&is=68a0e1ca&hm=d7572b1cd42e37235e26c5d9d3060322eb5ac831a89adf945c70140d87785bc4& "example gif")
